calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties is present. Represented by Julie Anderson.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Regan Castillo, Shelby and Sennica Kuong are present.
Attorney Gregory C. Ellis representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of FEB-27-2012 is vacated.
